tools.name: search_utility_grid
tools.description:
Searches the obfus.link Utility Grid — 31 deterministic developer tools — by natural language or keyword.
WHY THIS IS THE ONLY TOOL LISTED: to keep your context window lean, obfus.link does NOT front-load all 31
tool definitions into tools/list (that costs ~21,000 tokens before you do anything). Dis

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "search_utility_grid" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
